summary: New crates/cclab-jet/src/css/ module (~4,015 lines across 13 files) implementing a native Rust PostCSS + Tailwind CSS JIT pipeline: (1) css/mod.rs (363 lines): CssPipeline orchestrator — @import resolution → Tailwind JIT → directive expansion → lightningcss transform/minify → CssOutput; process(entry: &Path) and process_source(source, used_classes) entry points; 6 unit tests covering lightningcss transform, arbitrary values, dark variants, plugin emission, @apply expansion, and content scanning; (2) css/output.rs (33 lines): CssOutput struct with css: String and hash: String fields (content-addressable output); (3) css/import_resolver.rs (253 lines): resolve_imports() — recursive @import inliner with circular-import detection via visited PathBuf set; resolves relative paths and node_modules CSS; (4) css/directives.rs (369 lines): process_directives() — handles @tailwind base/components/utilities (replaces with TailwindLayers content), @apply <classes> (expands to property declarations), @layer routing; (5) css/tailwind/mod.rs (322 lines): TailwindEmitter struct + TailwindLayers { base, components, utilities } — orchestrates scanner + utility resolver + preflight + plugins into layered CSS output; emit(used_classes) and emit_from_content(content_root) methods; (6) css/tailwind/config.rs (532 lines): TailwindConfig { content, dark_mode, theme, plugins } — minimal JS object literal parser for tailwind.config.js; YAML fallback via jet.config.yaml css.tailwind section; JS config takes precedence; DarkMode::Class (default) and DarkMode::Media; ThemeConfig.extend_colors for hsl(var(--*)) patterns; (7) css/tailwind/scanner.rs (305 lines): ContentScanner — glob-based class extraction; scans className="...", class="...", template literals, clsx/cn patterns; returns HashSet<String> of used class names; uses globset crate for glob matching; (8) css/tailwind/utilities.rs (801 lines): class_to_css() — JIT utility rule generator mapping 200+ Tailwind utility classes to CSS rules; handles spacing (p-*, m-*, gap-*), sizing (w-*, h-*), flexbox, grid, typography, borders, backgrounds, shadows, transitions; arbitrary values via w-[300px] / text-[#ff0000] bracket syntax; extended colors from theme.extend_colors; (9) css/tailwind/variants.rs (137 lines): wrap_with_variants() + ParsedClass — strips responsive (sm:, md:, lg:, xl:, 2xl:) and state (hover:, focus:, active:, dark:, group-*, peer-*) prefixes, wraps generated rules in @media queries or :hover/:focus/etc selectors; (10) css/tailwind/preflight.rs (201 lines): Preflight CSS reset generator — emits box-sizing, margin resets, font normalization, form element resets matching Tailwind v3 Preflight; (11) css/plugins/mod.rs (77 lines): emit_plugins() dispatcher — routes to tailwindcss-animate and @tailwindcss/typography emitters based on TailwindConfig.plugins; (12) css/plugins/animate.rs (271 lines): native Rust tailwindcss-animate emitter — generates @keyframes + animation utility classes (animate-spin, animate-ping, animate-pulse, animate-bounce, animate-none); (13) css/plugins/typography.rs (351 lines): native Rust @tailwindcss/typography emitter — generates .prose component styles for headings, paragraphs, code, blockquote, tables. Modified existing files: Cargo.toml (+4 lines): added lightningcss = "1.0.0-alpha.57" and globset = "0.4" dependencies; src/lib.rs (+1 line): added pub mod css; src/bundler/mod.rs (+45/-1 lines): added try_process_css_entry() — detects sibling CSS entry (index.tsx → index.css), runs CssPipeline, appends Asset { filename: "index.<hash>.css", content: bytes, asset_type: Css } to BundleOutput.assets; src/dev_server/hmr.rs (+2 lines): added CssUpdate { css: String, filename: String, timestamp: u64 } HMR message variant for stylesheet hot-swap without full page reload; src/dev_server/mod.rs (+97/-6 lines): added css_entry: Option<PathBuf> + css_content_globs: Vec<String> fields, register_css_entry() method, CSS-aware file watcher that rebuilds CSS pipeline on .css or .ts/.tsx changes and broadcasts CssUpdate HMR message. Bonus: projects/conductor/be/src/mcp/server.py (+2/-2 lines): migrated from mcp.server.fastmcp.FastMCP to cclab.mcp.MCPServer.
